name: shadow-speak-skill
description: Turn short articles, dialogues, subtitle text, SRT/VTT captions, English or Japanese text into shadowing and review materials.

interface.displayName: Study Pack Builder / 学习包生成器
interface.shortDescription: Turn short text into speaking practice, review cards, and study notes.
interface.longDescription: Study Pack Builder helps English and Japanese learners convert short articles, dialogues, subtitle text, SRT/VTT captions, and learner-written sentences into shadowing scripts, sentence breakdowns, vocabulary notes, quizzes, Anki CSV cards, and social study check-in copy. YouTube links are optional and work only when public captions are available; pasted transcripts or SRT/VTT are the reliable path.
defaultPrompt: 把下面这段英文短文章做成跟读学习包，并生成 Anki CSV。
用电影字幕老师模式拆解这段英文台词，重点讲语气、停顿和重音。
把这段日语短文做成 N3-N2 学习包：假名、中文意思、句子拆解、跟读稿、小测验都要。
